settings.title_help: Optional. Shown above the body. Leave blank for no header.
settings.icon_help: FontAwesome class shown next to the title (e.g. fab fa-markdown). Leave blank for no icon.
settings.body_help: Standard Markdown (GitHub-flavored). Headings, lists, links, code, tables, and inline HTML are all supported. Inline HTML is rendered as-is, so only paste content you trust.
